title: pterocarpus officinalis subsp. gilletii
intro: Pterocarpus officinalis subsp. gilletii is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as Pili or African Pili. It has been traditionally used in West African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be used to make herbal teas and tinctures for its health-promoting properties.
